steps.title: Read the wave imagery
steps.content: The underlined lines describe waves that are repeatedly pushed back but keep rushing forward. The phrase "will not know defeat" gives the waves a persistent, undefeated quality.

steps.title: Match the function
steps.content: A calls the scene intimidating, but the speaker describes deep delight. C invents ambivalence about nature. D invents a contrast between the waves and the speaker's thoughts. The underlined portion characterizes the waves as persistent and enduring. The answer is B.
